title: festuca pumila var. sardoa
intro: Festuca pumila var. sardoa, also known as Corsican grass or Sardinian dwarf fescue, is a compact, evergreen grass species native to the mountainous regions of Sardinia and Corsica. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Festuca pumila var. sardoa include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
